subject: [PATCH v3 2/2] nilfs2: fix 64-bit division operations in nilfs_bmap_find_target_in_group()

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: The patch addresses a build failure on 32-bit ARM due to the introduction of u64 inode numbers. It changes division operations in nilfs_bmap_find_target_in_group() to use udiv_u64(). A compile-time assertion is also added that NILFS_BMAP_GROUP_DIV must be a power of two.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: The patch fixes a build failure on 32-bit ARM due to the introduction of u64 inode numbers by changing division operations in nilfs_bmap_find_target_in_group() to use udiv_u64(). It also adds a compile-time assertion that NILFS_BMAP_GROUP_DIV must be a power of two.
